name: un-consulted namespaces are surfaced as needs_grounding (cite-or-decline), never silently omitted
command: printf '%s' '{"pillars":{"security":[{"concern":"c","source_id":"owasp-asvs","grounding":"grounded"}]},"needs_grounding":[]}' > d.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-consult.sh" --design d.json 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'consult namespace=[a-z0-9-]+ status=needs_grounding' e.txt && echo unconsulted-surfaced 1>&2
